basic_details.job_title: BMRCL Deputy Chief Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Bangalore Metro Rail Corporation (BMRCL) Deputy Chief Engineer (Lift & Escalator) Notification 2026 has been released on 08 June 2026 on the official website of BMRCL under Advertisement No. BMRCL/HR/0002/PRJ/2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BMRCL Deputy Chief Engineer (Lift & Escalator) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: BE/ B. Tech in Mechanical/ Electrical/ Electrical & Electronics Engg.
qualification.details: BE/ B. Tech in Mechanical/ Electrical/ Electrical & Electronics Engineering.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BMRCL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download BMRCL Deputy Chief Engineer (Lift & Escalator) Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download BMRCL Deputy Chief Engineer (Lift & Escalator) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BMRCL Deputy Chief Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the BMRCL Deputy Chief Engineer (Lift & Escalator) post is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BE/B.Tech degree in Mechanical, Electrical, or Electrical & Electronics Engineering to be eligible for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Lift & Escalator) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Deputy Chief Engineer post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Lift & Escalator) role is 45 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Lift & Escalator) post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,64,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Deputy Chief Engineer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Deputy Chief Engineer (Lift & Escalator) in the Bangalore Metro Rail Corporation (BMRCL).

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the BMRCL Deputy Chief Engineer (Lift & Escalator) recruitment must be submitted online through the official BMRCL website.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Deputy Chief Engineer (Lift & Escalator) position will primarily involve an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, where a direct link is provided.
